about.title: About Us
about.p1: SVOM is a leading online auto parts store with TecDoc catalog integration.
about.p2: We offer over 235,000 OEM and aftermarket parts from verified suppliers.
about.p3: Our mission is to make auto parts search and purchase fast, convenient and reliable.

terms.p2: All website materials are protected by copyright.
terms.p3: We reserve the right to change terms at any time.
terms.p2_1: By using the site, you agree to the terms.
terms.p2_2: All materials are protected by copyright.
terms.p2_3: We process data in accordance with data protection laws.
terms.p2_4: We are not liable for damages related to site use.
terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.p1: By using SVOM, you agree to these terms.

delivery.courier_desc: Courier delivery in Kyiv — 1 day. Ukraine — 2+ days.
delivery.pickup_desc: Pickup points in your city. Free for orders over 3000 ₴.
delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.timing_desc: Standard delivery — 1-3 business days. Express — next day.

faq.p1: How to find a part? Use article search or TecDoc catalog.
faq.p2: How to place an order? Add parts to cart and fill out the form.
faq.p3: How to track an order? Check My Orders section after logging in.
faq.a1: Use article search or TecDoc catalog.
faq.a2: Add parts to cart and fill out the checkout form.
faq.a3: Check My Orders section after logging in.
faq.a4: Cash and cashless. Card online or upon receipt.
faq.a5: Returns within 14 days with original packaging.
faq.title: FAQ

support.p1: Our support team is ready to help you.
support.desc: Our support team is ready to help you with any questions.
support.title: Support
